data.title: Alchelyst and Lyra Client Solutions Complete Combination, Creating a Purpose-Built Platform to Support the Evolving Needs of Private Markets
data.description: Two leading companies, Alchelyst and Lyra Client Solutions, have successfully merged to form a new entity focused on supporting the growth of private markets infrastructure. The merger, backed by Motive Partners and anchor client Apollo (NYSE: APO), is now complete. The new combined company will operate under the Alchelyst name and will be led by Joan Kehoe, Founder and CEO of Alchelyst. This move brings together significant resources and expertise, with a refreshed brand identity to signify the union.

data.title: Monte Carlo’s New Agent Observability Delivers End-to-End Visibility Across Context, Performance, Behavior and Outputs
data.description: In San Francisco, Monte Carlo unveiled advanced Agent Observability features providing AI and data teams with comprehensive insight into AI agents' entire lifecycle. Many enterprises rushing to implement AI agents are realizing a lack of visibility into their performance in live settings. This deficiency is leading to decreased trust, as 53% of businesses anticipate having to extensively overhaul or reshape AI agent systems they have already launched.

data.title: Atana Wins 2026 Lighthouse Tech Talent Development Award for Best Innovative or Emerging Solution
data.description: Today, Atana, a behavioral intelligence platform based in Bellevue, Washington, was awarded the 2026 Lighthouse Tech Award for Best Innovative or Emerging Tech Solution in Talent Development by Lighthouse Research & Advisory. This prestigious award recognizes companies that are transforming the way organizations manage talent. Atana was chosen as the winner by an independent panel of judges. This recognition highlights Atana's excellence in predicting and influencing workplace behavior.
$33M funding secured by Waiv to expand AI precision testing.

data.title: Beyond Dubbing: Vozo AI Launches Visual Translate for Complete Video Localization
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, Vozo AI has introduced Visual Translate, a new tool designed to translate on-screen text seen in videos, expanding video localization capabilities beyond traditional methods like dubbing and subtitles. This innovative technology aims to enhance user experience by providing accurate translations of text appearing in videos.

data.title: IDM AND THE SKATE BOARD ASSOCIATION (SBA) UNVEIL PLANS FOR IDM ARENA AND HIGH-ALTITUDE TRAINING COMPLEX IN BIG BEAR LAKE
data.description: In a significant development, IDM and The Skate Board Association (SBA) have joined forces with Cooperative LA, esteemed global design firm Populous, Visit Big Bear (VBB), and Aambé to establish the groundbreaking multi-use IDM Arena at Big Bear Lake, California. The collaboration aims to create an elite high-altitude facility that will cater to various sports and recreational activities. This partnership signifies a major step forward in the realm of sports and design, with massive potential for growth and innovation in the industry.

data.title: Resolutions of Kojamo plc's Annual General Meeting and the organizing meeting of the Board of Directors; Kojamo's new business name Lumo Homes plc
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Kojamo plc conducted its Annual General Meeting in Helsinki at 2:45 p.m. EET. During the meeting, the financial statements for the year 2025 were approved. Key decisions were made regarding financial matters and organizational operations. The event was significant for stakeholders and shareholders, as it provided insights into the company's performance and future strategies. This meeting marked an important milestone in Kojamo plc's corporate governance and transparency to investors.

data.title: Mike Lindell Media Corp., (OTC: MLMC) Announces Strategic Partnership With Veteran Owned-American Independence Gold
data.description: Mike Lindell Media Corp. (MLMC) and its CEO, Mike Lindell, have established a strategic partnership with American Independence Gold, reinforcing the message "Freedom Isn't Given - It's Secured." This collaboration signifies a significant move for MLMC, showcasing a joint effort aimed at promoting the shared belief.

data.title: eClinicalWorks AI and Cloud-Powered Solutions Drive Rural Healthcare Transformation at Hyndman Area Health Center
data.description: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks, the leading ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that Hyndman Area Health Center, an FQHC having five sites in South-Central Pennsylvania, is utilizing advanced AI-powered tools from eClinicalWorks to cater to the unique requirements of its rural community and enhance healthcare services. Through the utilization of AI-driven automation, telehealth features, and dependable cloud infrastructure, eClinicalWorks is aiding in the improvement of healthcare delivery for the rural population.

data.title: Kamelia Ayrafar Joins Integral Ad Science (IAS) Board of Directors
data.description: An announcement was made today by Integral Ad Science (IAS), a key player in media quality, revealing that Kamelia Ayrafar, Head of AI, Members at Netflix, has joined IAS’s Board of Directors. This appointment is effective immediately. Kamelia, an experienced technology executive, specializing in the development and expansion of artificial intelligence (AI) within various platforms and organizations, is set to leverage her profound expertise in AI and product innovation to steer IAS’s technology strategy and long-term growth.

data.title: Concrete Integrates with Binance Wallet to Enable Access to Institutional-Grade USDT Yield
data.description: Blueprint Finance, a company specializing in multi-chain DeFi infrastructure, unveiled that its Ethereum-based institutional-grade vault infrastructure named Concrete has successfully merged with the Binance Wallet ecosystem. This integration marks a significant advancement as it allows users of Binance Wallet to directly engage with sophisticated USDT yield strategies, delivering risk-adjusted options through the wallet's interface. Concrete, specifically designed to tackle core obstacles within DeFi, emphasizes risk management within its infrastructure.

data.title: Unit Corporation Reports Fourth Quarter and Year End Results
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) submitted its consolidated financial statements for the year ending December 31, 2025 to OTC Markets Group Inc. on March 12, 2026. Interested parties can view the Company's current, quarterly, and annual reports on OTC's website at https://www.otcmarkets.com/stock/UNTC/disclosure, as well as on the Company's website at https://unitcorp.com/investor-relations/otc-sec-filings/. The Company's Fourth Quarter and Year End Results were also included in the filing.

data.title: Xiid Becomes Security Backbone for EV, Healthcare AI, and Specialized Cloud and DevOps Consultancy
data.description: Xiid Corp, a leader in pre-emptive cyber defense, has recently unveiled key partnerships with eVerged LLC, Consent Vault Inc., and Neutron Engineering. These alliances are geared towards bolstering cybersecurity by utilizing Xiid’s Terniion zero trust application control platform. This move is particularly targeted at the rapidly expanding sectors of global electric vehicles (EV) and healthcare, along with catering to the needs of multi-cloud enterprises. By teaming up with industry experts, Xiid aims to provide unparalleled security measures in these sectors, ensuring protection from potential threats.

data.title: Tallgrass Selects Turboden as Waste Heat-to-Power Provider to Deliver New Baseload Capacity in Ohio and Indiana
data.description: In Houston, Turboden America LLC, a subsidiary of power generation technology provider Turboden S.p.A. (a Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Group company), has secured a deal with Tallgrass, an energy solutions company, for the installation of three new Waste Heat-to-Power (WHP) ORC plants. These plants will be located at gas compressor stations in Columbus, Ohio, Chandlersville, Ohio, and St. Paul, Indiana. This project comes on the heels of Turboden providing an initial WHP system in 2024 for a facility.

data.title: High-Efficiency Multi-Phase SPI Boost Controller From Diodes Incorporated Enables Robust, Flexible Automotive Headlight Systems
data.description: Diodes Incorporated, a leading company in power management solutions, has announced the launch of AL8859Q, an automotive-compliant multi-phase SPI boost controller. This new offering is specifically tailored to address the demands of advanced headlight control units in vehicles. The AL8859Q is engineered to deliver high power density, efficiency, and EMI performance while meeting functional safety standards. It functions as the primary constant-voltage pre-stage for adaptive front lighting systems, encompassing high beams, low beams, and daytime running lights. This addition further bolsters Diodes Incorporated's extensive power management portfolio.

data.title: Electrolux Group Introduces Frigidaire DualZone Stacked Air Fryer
data.description: The Electrolux Group, based in Charlotte, North Carolina, announced on March 12, 2026, the release of a innovative DualZone Stacked Air Fryer as part of its Frigidaire brand. This space-efficient appliance aims to simplify and expedite cooking for families. It provides a versatile solution for cooking meals quickly and easily.
